case_title: 2228 UNION STREET INVESTORS VS. MERRILL REESE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 2228 UNION STREET INVESTORS A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT MERRILL REESE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D.B.A. MERRILL'S DRUG CENTERS DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (CCP SECTION 1132) FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY
ATTY'S CERTIFICATE IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS CONFESSING OF JUDGMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1134 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRILL REESE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D.B.A. MERRILL'S DRUG CENTERS $300,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300,000.00, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $300,000, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
